title: OmniFormatter Jinja / Liquid / EJS / Handlebars / Twig / Mustache / Nunjucks / Blade / Pug Configuration Schema
description: Merged formatting configuration for HTML templating engines.

htmlEscapeByDefault.description: All template engines escape HTML by default in {{ }} blocks. Unescaped output ({{{ }}} or {{! }}) is explicitly opt-in.

jinja__indentationSpaces.description: [Jinja2] Spaces per indentation level inside blocks.

jinja__trimBlocks.description: [Jinja2] Remove first newline after a block tag (trim_blocks=True).

jinja__lstripBlocks.description: [Jinja2] Strip leading whitespace from block tags (lstrip_blocks=True).

liquid__assignStyle.description: [Liquid] Prefer {% assign %} for simple values, {% capture %} for block content.

ejs__tagStyle.description: [EJS] Standard: <% %> for execution, <%= %> for safe output, <%- %> for raw output.

blade__bracketStyle.description: [Blade] Prefer @if/@foreach directives over @php raw blocks where possible.

pug__indentationSpaces.description: [Pug] Spaces per indentation level. Pug uses significant indentation.

pug__classAttributeStyle.description: [Pug] Use .class (CSS shorthand) vs class="class" attribute syntax.

mustache__strictLogicless.description: [Mustache] Mustache is strictly logic-less. No if/else or loops — use Sections ({{#key}}) only.
